title: Minimally Focused
description: Sodium mod with the necessary plugins :)
body:
# ✨ Performance Optimization Pack 

This modpack is a hand-picked collection of popular performance and quality-of-life mods designed to maximize your frame rate (FPS) and optimize the visual experience in Minecraft: Java Edition. This pack is specifically optimized for smooth gameplay on a wide range of devices, including low-end PCs and mobile launchers like **PojavLauncher** (Android).

***

## 🎯 Key Focus Areas

### 🚀 Core Performance & Stability

* **Optimized Rendering:** The core of this pack is the highly efficient **Sodium** rendering engine, which drastically improves FPS compared to the vanilla game.
* **Memory Management:** Includes **FerriteCore** to reduce memory usage (RAM), ensuring greater stability and better performance during long sessions.
* **Essential Foundations:** Based on the **Fabric loader** and includes the **Fabric API** dependency for guaranteed compatibility.

### 💡 Visual Enhancements & Quality-of-Life (QoL)

* **Dynamic Lighting:** **Sodium Dynamic Lights** allows hand-held light sources (such as torches) to emit light in real-time, improving exploration without placing blocks.
* **Vision Adjustment:** **Sodium Full Bright** adds a setting to fully adjust ambient light, providing an effective in-game night vision option.
* **Extended Settings:** Uses **Reese's Sodium Options** and **Sodium Options AP** to provide users with full, detailed control over all of Sodium's graphical settings.

***

## 📋 Comprehensive Mod List Included

This modpack bundles the following well-known, community-developed Fabric mods. **Please note that I am the curator and pack creator, not the author of the individual mods listed below.**

| Mod Name | Primary Function / Focus |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Sodium** | Reworks the Minecraft rendering engine for massive FPS increases. |
| **Fabric API** | Required core dependency for all Fabric mods. |
| **FerriteCore** | Optimizes and reduces the game's RAM usage. |
| **Sodium Dynamic Lights** | Adds dynamic real-time light casting from held items. |
| **Sodium Full Bright** | Adds an option for full-brightness (Night Vision effect). |
| **Reese's Sodium Options** | Extends and improves the Sodium settings screen UI. |
| **Sodium Options AP** | Compatibility tool for Sodium settings and other mods. |
| **Sodium Extra** | Adds various extra graphical features and tweaks to Sodium. |
| **Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks** | Corrects visual rendering bugs with path blocks (grass paths, etc.). |
| **Txnlib** | Required utility library/dependency for certain mods in the pack. |

***

# Mandatory Final Note

Thank you for selecting this optimized Modpack from Z.XP.XP.900. We are committed to high-performance competitive and utility Minecraft content, continually expanding our portfolio.
